tagline: Excellence in Building, Craftsmanship in Renovation
seoDescription: BRM Builders (Building Repair & Management, Inc.) is a licensed Santa Rosa general contractor serving Sonoma County and the North Bay since 2006. Custom homes, remodels, room additions, tenant improvements, and fire rebuilds. CSLB #903189. Call (707) 481-6228.
heroHeading: Santa Rosa's Trusted General Contractor Since 2006
heroSubheading: From custom homes and additions to remodels and fire rebuilds, BRM Builders delivers quality construction across Sonoma County and the North Bay. Family roots, licensed craftsmanship, and a personal commitment to every project.
highlights: California licensed general contractor, CSLB #903189 — fully licensed and insured
BBB Accredited Business with an A+ rating, accredited since 2018
Serving Santa Rosa, Sonoma County, and the North Bay since 2006
Design-build capable: architectural drawings, engineering, and construction under one roof
Full range of work — custom homes, remodels, additions, tenant improvements, and fire rebuilds
Founder Christian Andersen comes from a Sonoma County building family
aboutHeading: A Sonoma County Builder With Deep Local Roots
aboutBody: BRM Builders, formally Building Repair & Management, Inc., has been building and renovating homes and commercial spaces throughout Sonoma County and the North Bay since 2006. The company is owned and operated by Christian Andersen, a licensed California general contractor who grew up in the trade. His father, Marsh Andersen, was a well-respected Sonoma County builder, and that family tradition of quality craftsmanship carries through every project BRM takes on today.

As a full-service general contractor, BRM handles everything from new custom home construction to kitchen and bathroom remodels, room additions, and commercial tenant improvements. The team works hand-in-hand with homeowners and designers through a design-build approach that brings architectural drawings, engineering, and construction together, with weekly owner meetings and complimentary consultations so clients always know where their project stands.

BRM is fully licensed and insured under California CSLB license #903189, an A+ rated BBB Accredited Business, and a member of the North Coast Builders Exchange. Whether it is a historic renovation, a dream custom home, or rebuilding after a fire, BRM Builders is committed to craftsmanship you can see and construction that exceeds expectations.

services.title: New Custom Home Construction
services.description: Build your dream home from a set of architectural plans. BRM offers design-build services that bring drawings, engineering, and construction together for a seamless custom home experience.

services.title: Remodels & Renovations
services.description: Kitchen and bathroom remodels, master suite conversions, home offices, and living spaces in styles ranging from Traditional and Victorian to Modern, Rustic, and Mediterranean.

services.title: Room Additions
services.description: Single or multiple room additions that integrate seamlessly with your existing home, with permitting coordinated throughout the North Bay and quality materials throughout.

services.title: Tenant Improvements & Commercial Building
services.description: Commercial buildouts and tenant improvements done in collaboration with your designers. No job is too small or too big when it comes to improving your space.

services.title: Fire, Smoke & Water Damage Restoration
services.description: Restoration and rebuilds after fire, smoke, or water damage — including full fire rebuilds, an area BRM has handled across Sonoma County.

services.title: Structural & Foundation Repair
services.description: Structural damage repair, foundation work, and earthquake retrofitting to keep your home safe and sound for the long term.

hours: By appointment — call (707) 481-6228 for a consultation
notes:
CONFIRMED — this is the right business. Cross-checked phone (707) 481-6228 and address 1851 Piner Rd Ste D, Santa Rosa, CA 95403 across the company site and BBB/BuildZoom; all match. Legal name: Building Repair & Management, Inc. (DBA / branded as "BRM Builders" on Facebook). Owner: Christian Andersen; his father Marsh Andersen was a Sonoma County builder (family story per brmbuild.com/about.php).

SOURCES: Company site (live, not dead) — https://brmbuild.com/ , /about.php , /services.php , /remodels.php (email chris@brmbuild.com confirmed on homepage). BBB profile (A+, Accredited since 11/9/2018, principal Christian Andersen, 1851 Piner Rd Ste D, CSLB #903189 exp 9/30/2027): https://www.bbb.org/us/ca/santa-rosa/profile/general-contractor/building-repair-management-1116-373837 . BuildZoom (License 903189 Active, General Building, Corp, bond $15k, 30 permitted projects including fire rebuilds/additions/tenant improvements, score 104): https://www.buildzoom.com/contractor/building-repair-management-inc . Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/p/BRM-Builders-61569551142960/ . Houzz profile exists but has 0 reviews/0 photos: https://www.houzz.com/professionals/general-contractors/building-repair-and-management-inc-pfvwus-pf~1479113631 .

LICENSE: CSLB #903189 cited on company site, BBB, and BuildZoom (Active, General Building B, expires 9/30/2027). I was NOT able to load the live CSLB LicenseDetail page directly (the lookup is JS/form-driven), but three independent sources agree on the number, so I consider it verified. An older inactive license 895191 and an inactive EPA NAT-116330-2 also appear on BuildZoom.

FOUNDING YEAR caveat: I used 2006 (per brmbuild.com/about.php "doing business since 2006"). BBB lists "started 9/10/2007" and "18 years in business," and BBB file opened 3/11/2011 — so company age is ~2006–2007. NOTE the homepage's "47 years of experience" refers to COMBINED TEAM experience, not company age; do not present BRM as 47 years old.

REVIEWS/RATING gap: No public star rating or quotable customer reviews were findable. Houzz shows 0 reviews; HomeAdvisor profile returned HTTP 403 (could not read); no Yelp or Google Business rating surfaced in search. BBB shows A+ rating and accreditation but no customer review score. Therefore rating, testimonials, and hours are left EMPTY rather than fabricated. The only legitimate trust signals to lean on are: CSLB license, BBB A+/accredited, North Coast Builders Exchange membership, and BuildZoom top-percentile score.

HOURS: Not published on any source — left empty. Phone for contact appears as (707) 481-6228 on the company site; BBB/BuildZoom/Houzz list an alternate (707) 527-8797. Use the requested (707) 481-6228.

PHOTOS: realPhotoUrls point to images on the business's own domain (brmbuild.com). These are likely their own project photos but I could not visually confirm each is a genuine BRM project vs. a representative image; verify before publishing. owners.jpg is a team/owner photo. Do NOT treat the slider images as guaranteed-original without a quick visual check.

DISTINCT: Notable historic renovation of a 1906 Healdsburg home (built by Jane Kelley, wife of Captain Kelley) per about page; member of North Coast Builders Exchange; design-build with weekly owner meetings and free consultations; emphasizes low overhead for competitive pricing.
